doc_name: Affibody gets izokibep ‘back on track’ while seeking ‘new home’ after drug’s Acelyrin rejection

chunks.text: Affibody may not have expected to be working on izokibep again, but the Swedish biotech hasn’t wasted an opportunity to showcase the inflammation drug’s potential to prospective partners.
chunks.doc_name: Affibody gets izokibep ‘back on track’ while seeking ‘new home’ after drug’s Acelyrin rejection
